div1.entryFree: Eke, vb. (cf. Eche), to add to, to lengthen, to piece out: to e. it and to draw it out in length, Merch. III, 2, 23 (Q1 eck, Ff Q2. Merch. III, 2, 23 4 ich and eech). and mine, to e. out hers, As I, 2, 208. to e. out that wherein toward me my homely stars have failed, All's II, 5, 79.
